name: Tomato-Stuffed Peppers (Btvc62a)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sun-dried tomatoes, marinated in olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a thin slice from the tops of the stem ends of the peppers.
2. Core and seed the peppers.
3. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
4. Heat the olive oil in a small skillet.
5. Add the shallots and garlic; sauté for 2 minutes.
6. Add the sun-dried tomatoes, rice, herbs, salt, and pepper; stir until well mixed.
7. Spoon a portion of the mixture into each pepper shell.
8. Place the peppers in a shallow baking pan.
9. Sprinkle the cheese on top.
10. Bake, uncovered, for 10 to 15 minutes.
11. Serve at once.
